name: iGlobal
title_tag: Manage Your Business Information on iGlobal with Synup
tags: india; france; germany; netherlands; uae; south-africa; ireland; australia; new-zealand; canada; united-kingdom-gb; united-states-us; argentina
detailed_paragraph:
iGlobal + Synup

Add, claim, edit business listings & reviews on iGlobal with Synup's listings & review management tools.

What is iGlobal?

iGlobal, a trusted international business directory, facilitates connections between businesses and customers on a global scale. Whether you're a business owner looking to expand your reach or a consumer seeking international products or services, iGlobal offers a platform for seamless global interactions.

Why iGlobal + Synup?

  • Complete Control Over Listings: With the ability to manage your business listings on iGlobal, you maintain full control over your online presence, ensuring your business is represented accurately.
  • Broaden Your Reach: Adding your business to iGlobal through Synup means increased visibility. Help potential customers discover you, effectively expanding your reach.
  • Accurate Business Information: Enhance trust and credibility by publishing accurate information on iGlobal.
  • Customer Engagement: View and respond back to reviews on iGlobal, fostering a positive relationship with your customers, showing that you value their feedback and are attentive to their needs.

How to integrate iGlobal + Synup?

The iGlobal integration is available to all Synup listings plan subscribers. To view & manage the iGlobal integration:

  1. Visit the Listings tab on Synup's console.
  2. Navigate to the Premium Listings section.
  3. Click on the iGlobal logo to manage the Synup + iGlobal integration and associated settings.
